name: G.Bramamuthu
background: "Bramamuthu is an exceptionally driven student with a strong desire to master his native language by pursuing a B.A. in Tamil at STC College. Because his family relies entirely on unpredictable, seasonal agricultural income, they are facing severe financial constraints in meeting his college tuition, transportation, and study material costs. Your support would ensure his higher education is not derailed by financial hardship."

name: Jehoshepa
background:
Meet Jehoshepa, a sweet girl who is ready to start LKG! Her father is a hardworking temporary mechanic and the only earner in the family. With her mother battling illness, the father carries the heavy burden of supporting the family and paying medical bills all on his own.

Despite their struggles, they have a beautiful dream: to give Jehoshepa a top-tier education at The Grace International School. They want her to have the opportunities they never had.

They cannot do this alone. We are raising funds to cover Jehoshepa's admission and tuition fees. Any contribution, big or small, will help ease the burden on this hardworking father and give this little girl the bright future she deserves. Please donate and share!

name: J.Abinsha
school: Sri Sarada Matriculation Higher Secondary School
background:
Meet Abinsha. When she was very young, she tragically lost her father. Since then, her mother has been raising Abinsha and her sister entirely on her own.

Her mother works a temporary job, earning just ₹8,000 a month. While she works incredibly hard to feed and shelter her two daughters, this small income makes paying for school fees impossible. However, this mother has a powerful vision: she is determined to see her daughters educated, independent, and successful.

She cannot do it without our help. We are raising funds to cover Abinsha's school fees, uniforms, and books. Please consider donating to help this resilient single mother keep her daughter in school. Every contribution, no matter the size, brings Abinsha one step closer to the bright future her mother dreams of!

name: J.Abinsha
background:

name: A.Manish kumar
background: Manish Kumar comes from a very humble background. His father is physically handicapped — he lost the use of his right leg due to a tragic accident and is unable to work. His mother is a homemaker and has no source of income. The family has been struggling to make ends meet with no stable financial support. Despite these hardships, Manish Kumar remains determined to pursue his education and dreams of building a better future for his family.
details: Books, Bag, Notes, Stationery Kit, Tuition Fees

name: A.Subarna
background: Subarna is a dedicated student facing financial difficulties. Her parents work as daily wage laborers and struggle to afford her higher secondary education expenses. She aspires to complete her schooling and support her family.

name: Joshua.J
background: Joshua is a bright and ambitious student. He is passionate about technology and is always eager to learn new things. His parents are supportive of his dreams but are facing severe financial constraints to afford his engineering tuition and exam fees.
details: 1 year of study including Exam Fees

name: Sandru Mugin.V
performance: Dedicated student with a passion for literature
background: Sandru is pursuing his Bachelor's degree in Tamil Literature. He comes from an underprivileged background where affording higher education is a significant challenge. Your support will directly help him complete his crucial academic year.

name: Saran Mari
performance: Consistently performing well in literary studies
background: Saran Mari is a hardworking student aiming to graduate in Tamil Literature. Financial struggles at home are threatening to halt his education, making sponsorship vital for his continued success.

name: Sathya.K
background: Sathya is just beginning her educational journey. Her family relies on minimal daily wages, making it very tough to afford basic early schooling needs like books, bags, uniforms, and transportation.
details: Books, Bag, Uniform, School Fees, Van Fees
